title: About Noman Shakir
content: Noman Shakir (CodeWithZavi) is a Full-Stack Developer and AI/ML Engineer with expertise in modern web applications, AI-powered solutions, and machine learning systems. Based in Islamabad, Pakistan. Email: nomanshaker2@gmail.com. GitHub: @CodeWithZavi. LinkedIn: codewithzavii.

title: Roles
content: Current roles: Full-Stack Developer, AI/ML Engineer, Backend Specialist, AI Application Developer, Machine Learning Practitioner, Intelligent Systems Builder. Also a Freelancer and Problem Solver.

title: Services Offered
content: Services: Software Developer, Frontend Developer, Problem Solving, Freelancer.

title: Programming Languages
content: Languages: HTML5, CSS3, JavaScript, TypeScript, C, Java, Python.

title: Frameworks
content: Frameworks: Next.js, TailwindCSS, Express.js, Flutter.

title: Libraries
content: Libraries: React, Three.js, Styled-Components, Framer Motion, Zustand, Redux, NextAuth.js, Prisma.

content: Tools: Git, GitHub, Postman, Figma, Docker.

content: Runtime: Node.js for server-side JavaScript.

title: Databases
content: Databases: MySQL, PostgreSQL, MongoDB, Firebase. Experience with both SQL and NoSQL.

title: AI Intern at Convo Islamabad
content: AI Intern at Convo Islamabad (Present). Working with Python and SQL to develop AI-powered solutions. Training and fine-tuning ML models. Implementing NLP for text analysis, sentiment analysis. Collaborating to integrate ML models into production.

title: Backend Developer at GDSC Comsats
content: Backend Developer at GDSC Comsats (Feb 2022 - Jul 2023). Planned induction programs, conducted CSS workshops, promoted events, collaborated with cross-functional teams.

title: Blood Bank Management System
content: Desktop app with Java and SQL for managing blood donation, storage, and distribution. Category: Database Systems. Tech: Java, SQL, Database Design.

title: Huffman Coding Compression Tool
content: Java app implementing Huffman Coding for lossless data compression with GUI. Category: Data Structures & Algorithms. Tech: Java, Algorithms, Compression.

title: Machine Learning Projects Collection
content: 4 end-to-end ML apps with Flask APIs: House Price Prediction (Linear Regression), Celebrity Recognition (SVM 95%+), Pakistan Celebrity Classifier (SVM), Heart Disease Predictor (Random Forest 85%+). Category: AI/ML.

title: Facial Expression Analyzer
content: Real-time emotion detection using CNN and OpenCV. Detects emotions from webcam/images/video with bounding boxes. Applications: AI chatbots, classroom engagement, mental health monitoring. Category: AI/ML.

title: GymFitness Platform
content: Full-stack fitness management with role-based access (Users, Coaches, Admins). Workout timer, nutrition tracking, class bookings, premium subscriptions. Category: Web Development. Tech: React, TypeScript, Supabase, TailwindCSS.

title: Crypto Trading Platform
content: Cryptocurrency trading simulation with real-time market data, JWT auth with bcrypt, RESTful APIs, portfolio management. MERN stack (React 19, Node.js, MongoDB, Express). Vercel + MongoDB Atlas. Category: Web Development.

title: QuickEdit AI Editor
content: AI-powered image and video editor using Cloudinary AI API. User auth, tiered credit system. Category: Web Development. Tech: TypeScript, Next.js, TailwindCSS, Shadcn, Cloudinary. Deployed: quick-edit-app.vercel.app.

title: FigPro Collaborative Design
content: Collaborative design tool like Figma using Next.js, TypeScript, LiveBlocks API, Fabric.js. Real-time team design collaboration. Deployed: fig-pro-github.vercel.app. Category: Web Development.

title: Facility Management System
content: MERN stack solution for booking facility time slots with role-based access. Category: Web Development. Tech: TypeScript, React, TailwindCSS, Node.js, MongoDB.

title: About This Portfolio
content: Noman Shakir's 3D interactive portfolio built with Next.js, React Three Fiber, Framer Motion, Three.js, TailwindCSS. Features 3D models (computer, Earth, animated character), dark/light mode. Deployed on Vercel.
